g.text: LRU | O(n) scan | Temporal | Timestamp| No
Clock | O(1) amrt | Approx | R bit | No
Recommendation: Clock for production, Optimal for benchmarking

div.p: Key Insight: The 3-frame constraint forces early evictions.

ul.li: FIFO evicts blindly by age → can evict "hot" pages
LRU tracks actual usage → respects locality
Clock approximates LRU with minimal hardware support
Optimal proves 7 faults is the theoretical minimum
⚠️ Evicts page 1 at step 4 (needed at step 5!)

g.text: Step | F0 | F1 | F2 | Hand | Action
Why FIFO Can Get WORSE with More Memory

div.p: ANOMALY DETECTED FIFO: 9→10 faults when adding a frame!

// depends ONLY on load order, not access pattern.
